SEARCH
Package com.artmarketplace.dao

Class ArtworkDAO

java.lang.Object
com.artmarketplace.dao.ArtworkDAO
public class ArtworkDAO extends Object
Data Access Object (DAO) implementation for the "artwork" database table.

This class encapsulates all direct interaction with the persistent database storage for Artwork entities. It handles low-level JDBC connections, query execution, mapping tabular SQL row data into Java objects, and structural exception fallback handling.

Version:
1.0.0
Author:
ACER
See Also:

  • DbConfig

  • Constructor Details

    • ArtworkDAO

      public ArtworkDAO()

  • Method Details

    • addArtwork

      public boolean addArtwork(com.artmarketplace.model.Artwork artwork)
      Persists a new artwork entry into the persistent database storage.

      Establishes a connection, configures a pre-compiled SQL insert statement using positional parameters to secure data integrity against SQL injection vectors, and maps attributes from the entity object to the database fields.

      Parameters:
      artwork - the Artwork instance containing data fields to be added; must not be null.
      Returns:
      true if the database insertion successfully altered 1 or more rows; false if the execution failed or zero rows were affected.

    • getAllArtworks

      public List<com.artmarketplace.model.Artwork> getAllArtworks()
      Scans the persistent data layer to compile an active catalog of all recorded artwork.

      Generates a structural query ordered dynamically by the primary key identifier in descending sequence to highlight newly listed artwork first.

      Returns:
      a List containing fully built Artwork domain instances; returns an initialized empty list if zero records exist in the database table.

    • getArtworkById

      public com.artmarketplace.model.Artwork getArtworkById(int artworkId)
      Looks up an individual artwork reference matching an exact primary key criterion.

      Safely isolates query tasks using database parameters to dynamically search for a single table row with the specified identifier.

      Parameters:
      artworkId - the exact database integer unique identifier assigned to the required entry.
      Returns:
      a populated Artwork entity matching the record key; returns null if no corresponding record exists in the system database.

    • updateArtwork

      public boolean updateArtwork(com.artmarketplace.model.Artwork artwork)
      Modifies historical database attributes on an existing persistent artwork entry.

      Matches the core record via its underlying database identity key and uses an UPDATE query to replace the old text, numbers, and image paths with the object's current state.

      Parameters:
      artwork - the Artwork domain object representing updated values; must contain a valid, pre-existing structural primary key ID field.
      Returns:
      true if an existing entry matched the identity constraint criteria and successfully modified properties; false if update processing missed targets.

    • deleteArtwork

      public boolean deleteArtwork(int artworkId)
      Removes an artwork entry from the persistent database.

      **Warning**: This action executes a permanent delete operation on the database table row. Ensure cascading rules or application confirmations are handled safely before calling this logic.

      Parameters:
      artworkId - the unique identifier of the artwork record targeted for deletion.
      Returns:
      true if a record matching the unique ID was found and deleted; false if no row was removed from the database.
